title: Ba`al #1186
definition:
Baal-meon = "lord of the habitation"

 1) a town in Reuben, mentioned in connection with Nebo, and in the time
    of Ezekiel, Moabite
nasbUsage:
Definition: Baal-meon = "lord of the habitation"

 1) a town in Reuben, mentioned in connection with Nebo, and in the time
    of Ezekiel, Moabite

    NASB:  Baal of (the) habitation, a place E. of the Jordan
